节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: AppStorage singleton is sub-class of see LocalStorage for UI state of app-wide access and same life cycle as the app.
Obtain a handler or an alias to AppStorage property with given name. return undefined otherwise
注释信息: @returns { AbstractProperty<T> | undefined } AbstractProperty object if property with given name exists
节点.return_description: AbstractProperty object if property with given name exists

节点.功能描述: Obtain a handler or an alias to AppStorage property with given name. If property does not exist in AppStorage, create it with given default value. create it with given default value.
注释信息: @param { T } defaultValue If property does not exist in AppStorage,

节点.功能描述: Called when a link is set. Create and return a two-way sync ("link") to named property
Create and return a two-way sync ("link") to named property Same as @see LocalStorage.link() return 'undefined' if named property does not already exist in AppStorage
注释信息: @param { string } propName - name of source property in AppStorage

节点.功能描述: Like see @Link(), but will create and initialize a new source property in AppStorage if missing Same as see LocalStorage.setAndLink()
Like see @link(), but will create and initialize a new source property in AppStorage if missing Same as see LocalStorage.setAndLink() default value must be of type T, can be undefined or null.
注释信息: @param { string } propName - name of source property in AppStorage
@param { T } defaultValue - value to be used for initializing new property in AppStorage

节点.功能描述: Called when a property is set. Create and return a one-way sync ('prop') to named property
Create and return a one-way sync ('prop') to named property Same as @see LocalStorage.prop() return undefined if named property does not already exist in AppStorage.
注释信息: @param { string } propName - name of source property in AppStorage

节点.功能描述: Like see Prop(), will create and initialize a new source property in AppStorage if missing Same as see LocalStorage.setAndProp()

Like @see prop(), will create and initialize a new source property in AppStorage if missing Same as see LocalStorage.setAndProp() default value must be of type T, can be undefined or null. return undefined if named property does not exist in AppStorage.
注释信息: @param { string } propName - name of source property in AppStorage
@param { T } defaultValue - value to be used for initializing new property in AppStorage.

节点.功能描述: Checks if AppStorage has a property with given name returns true if property with given name exists same as ES6 Map.prototype.has() Same as see LocalStorage.has()
Checks if AppStorage has a property with given name returns true if property with given name exists same as ES6 Map.prototype.has() Same as see LocalStorage.has()
注释信息: @returns { boolean } true if property with such name exists in AppStorage
节点.return_description: true if property with such name exists in AppStorage

节点.功能描述: Same as see LocalStorage.get() Obtain the value of property with given name, returns undefined if the property does not exist in AppStorage.
Same as see LocalStorage.get() Obtain the value of property with given name, returns undefined if the property does not exist in AppStorage.
注释信息: @returns { T | undefined } property value of type T if found or undefined
节点.return_description: property value of type T if found or undefined

节点.功能描述: Set value of given property in AppStorage Method sets nothing and returns false if property with this name does not exist or if newValue is `undefined` or `null`. Same as see LocalStorage.set()

Set value of given property in AppStorage Method sets nothing and returns false if property with this name does not exist in AppStorage newValue can be undefined or null from API 12. Same as see LocalStorage.set()
注释信息: @param { T } newValue - must be of type T, can be undefined or null
@returns { boolean } true on success, i.e. when above conditions are satisfied, otherwise false
节点.return_description: true on success, i.e. when above conditions are satisfied, otherwise false

节点.功能描述: Set value of given property, if it exists, see set() . Add property if no property with given name in AppStorage,. yet, and initialize with given value. Do nothing if newValue is undefined or null see LocalStorage.setOrCreate()

Set value of given property, if it exists, see set() . Add property if no property with given name in AppStorage, and initialize with given value. newValue can be undefined or null from API 12 see LocalStorage.setOrCreate()
注释信息: @param { T } newValue - must be of type T, can be undefined or null

节点.功能描述: Delete property with given name from AppStorage Use with caution: Before deleting a prop from AppStorage all its subscribers need to unsubscribe from the property. This method fails and returns false if given property still has subscribers Another reason for failing is unknown property name. Developer advise: Subscribers to a property in AppStorage are created with see link(), see prop() and also via @StorageLink and @StorageProp state variable decorators. That means as long as their is a @Component instance that uses such decorated variable or a sync relationship with a SubscribedAbstractProperty variable the property can not (and also should not!) be deleted from AppStorage. Same as see LocalStorage.delete()

Delete property with given name from AppStorage Use with caution: Before deleting a prop from AppStorage all its subscribers need to unsubscribe from the property. This method fails and returns false if given property still has subscribers Another reason for failing is unknown property name. Developer advise: Subscribers to a property in AppStorage are created with see link(), see prop() and also via @StorageLink and @StorageProp state variable decorators. That means as long as their is a @Component instance that uses such decorated variable or a sync relationship with a SubscribedAbstractProperty variable the property can not (and also should not!) be deleted from AppStorage. Same as see LocalStorage.delete()
Provide names of all properties in AppStorage same as ES6 Map.prototype.keys() Same as see LocalStorage.keys()
Provide names of all properties in AppStorage same as ES6 Map.prototype.keys() Same as see LocalStorage.keys()
Called when a cleanup occurs.
Delete all properties from the AppStorage. Precondition is that there are no subscribers, see Delete().
Delete all properties from the AppStorage. Precondition is that there are no subscribers, see Delete(). that still has subscribers.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } false and deletes no properties if there is any property
节点.return_description: false and deletes no properties if there is any property

节点.功能描述: Called when the data can be changed.
Method returns the number of properties currently in AppStorage
Method returns the number of properties currently in AppStorage

节点.功能描述: AbstractProperty can be understood as a handler or an alias to a property inside LocalStorage / AppStorage singleton allows to read the value with @see get and to change the value with @see set. Functions reads the referenced AppStorage/LocalStorage property value with given name @see get() write a new value to the AppStorage/LocalStorage property value @see set() returns the referenced AppStorage/LocalStorage property name @see info() Use ref or setAndRef to obtain a AbstractProperty.
reads value of the referenced AppStorage/LocalStorage property.
注释信息: @returns { T } value of the referenced AppStorage/LocalStorage property.
节点.return_description: value of the referenced AppStorage/LocalStorage property.

节点.功能描述: Set new value, must be of type T, can be 'undefined' or 'null'. Updates the value of the referenced AppStorage/LocalStorage property.
注释信息: @param { T } newValue new value set to AppStorage/LocalStorage

节点.功能描述: returns the name of the referenced property
注释信息: @returns { string } name of the referenced property

节点.功能描述: SubscribedAbstractProperty<T> is the return value of - AppStorage static functions Link(), Prop(), SetAndLink(), and SetAndProp() - LocalStorage member methods link(), prop(), setAndLink(), and setAndProp() 'T' can be boolean, string, number or custom class. Main functions see get() reads the linked AppStorage/LocalStorage property value, see set(newValue) write a new value to the synched AppStorage/LocalStorage property see aboutToBeDeleted() ends the sync relationship with the AppStorage/LocalStorage property The app must call this function before the SubscribedAbstractProperty<T> object goes out of scope.

EnvProps object
Property name of Environment variable
DefaultValue is the default value if cannot get the environment property value
Defines the Environment interface.
Constructor.
Called when a property value is added to Environment.

Creates a new property in AppStorage. The UI framework implementation takes care of updating its value whenever the named device environment property changes. Recommended use is at app startup. The function call fails and returns false if a property with given name exists in AppStorage already. It is wrong API use to access a property with given name in AppStorage before calling Environment.envProp.
注释信息: @param { S } value - is the default value if cannot get the environment property value

节点.功能描述: Called when multiple property values are added to Environment.

Property name
If AppStorage does not include this property it will be initialized with this value
Defines the PersistentStorage interface.
Constructor parameters.
Called when a persistence property is stored.
Add property 'key' to AppStorage properties whose current value will be persistent. If AppStorage does not include this property it will be added and initializes with given value
注释信息: @param { T } defaultValue - If AppStorage does not include this property it will be initialized with this value

节点.功能描述: Called when a property is deleted.
Reverse of @see persistProp
注释信息: @param { string } key - no longer persist the property named key

parameters.说明: no longer persist the property named key

节点.功能描述: Called when multiple persistence properties are stored.

LocalStorage Class implements a Map of ObservableObjectBase UI state variables. Instances can be created to manage UI state within a limited "local" access, and life cycle as defined by the app. AppStorage singleton is sub-class of LocalStorage for UI state of app-wide access and same life cycle as the app.
Construct new instance of LocalStorage initialize with all properties and their values that Object.keys(params) returns Property values must not be undefined.
注释信息: @param { Object } [initializingProperties] - Object containing keys and values. see set() for valid values

parameters.说明: Object } [initializingProperties] - Object containing keys and values. see set() for valid values

节点.功能描述: Like see link(), but will create and initialize a new source property in LocalStorage if missing default value must be of type T, can be undefined or null. Apps can use SDK functions of base class SubscribedAbstractProperty<T>

@param { T } defaultValue - value to be used for initializing new property in LocalStorage

节点.功能描述: Like see prop(), will create and initialize a new source property in LocalStorage if missing Default value must be of type T, can be undefined or null. Apps can use SDK functions of base class SubscribedAbstractProperty<S>

节点.功能描述: Delete property from StorageBase Use with caution: Before deleting a prop from LocalStorage all its subscribers need to unsubscribe from the property. This method fails and returns false if given property still has subscribers Another reason for failing is unknown property. Developer advise: Subscribers are created with see link(), see prop() and also via @LocalStorageLink and @LocalStorageProp state variable decorators. That means as long as their is a @Component instance that uses such decorated variable or a sync relationship with a SubscribedAbstractProperty variable the property can nit (and also should not!) be deleted from LocalStorage.
Delete all properties from the LocalStorage instance Precondition is that there are no subscribers. method returns false and deletes no properties if there is any property that still has subscribers
